1. Identify where and why the error occurs from the error message.

1. `<reasoning>` is OPTIONAL. Include it only if it aids proof construction.

4. Follow the tag structure exactly. No extra text before, between, or after the tags.

<reasoning>
The proof attempt fails because `exact L5 xs ys` is not enough to resolve the theorem in this context; the target is a theorem with explicit parameters and an implication, so we should use the induction theorem directly with the length hypothesis.

by
  intro h
